'''kohadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrangled|quadrangled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrangled|quadrangled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kohadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohadhithi|kohadhithi]] || [[word:kohadhiji|kohadhiji]] || [[word:kohadhishi|kohadhishi]] || [[word:kohadhiki|kohadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohadhuthuthu|kohadhuthuthu]] || [[word:kohadhujuju|kohadhujuju]] || [[word:kohadhushushu|kohadhushushu]] || [[word:kohadhukuku|kohadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohadhuthu|kohadhuthu]] || [[word:kohadhuju|kohadhuju]] || [[word:kohadhushu|kohadhushu]] || [[word:kohadhuku|kohadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohadhufthuf|kohadhufthuf]] || [[word:kohadhufjuf|kohadhufjuf]] || [[word:kohadhufshuf|kohadhufshuf]] || [[word:kohadhufkuf|kohadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohadhethe|kohadhethe]] || [[word:kohadheje|kohadheje]] || [[word:kohadheshe|kohadheshe]] || [[word:kohadheke|kohadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohadhothotho|kohadhothotho]] || [[word:kohadhojojo|kohadhojojo]] || [[word:kohadhoshosho|kohadhoshosho]] || [[word:kohadhokoko|kohadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohadhotho|kohadhotho]] || [[word:kohadhojo|kohadhojo]] || [[word:kohadhosho|kohadhosho]] || [[word:kohadhoko|kohadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohadhofthof|kohadhofthof]] || [[word:kohadhofjof|kohadhofjof]] || [[word:kohadhofshof|kohadhofshof]] || [[word:kohadhofkof|kohadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohadhïfthïf|kohadhïfthïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfjïf|kohadhïfjïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfshïf|kohadhïfshïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfkïf|kohadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohadhïfthïfthïf|kohadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfjïfjïf|kohadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfshïfshïf|kohadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfkïfkïf|kohadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohadhïfthïf|kohadhïfthïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfjïf|kohadhïfjïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfshïf|kohadhïfshïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfkïf|kohadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohadhïfthïf|kohadhïfthïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfjïf|kohadhïfjïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfshïf|kohadhïfshïf]] || [[word:kohadhïfkïf|kohadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohadhæthæ|kohadhæthæ]] || [[word:kohadhæjæ|kohadhæjæ]] || [[word:kohadhæshæ|kohadhæshæ]] || [[word:kohadhækæ|kohadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohadhathatha|kohadhathatha]] || [[word:kohadhajaja|kohadhajaja]] || [[word:kohadhashasha|kohadhashasha]] || [[word:kohadhakaka|kohadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohadhatha|kohadhatha]] || [[word:kohadhaja|kohadhaja]] || [[word:kohadhasha|kohadhasha]] || [[word:kohadhaka|kohadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohadhafthaf|kohadhafthaf]] || [[word:kohadhafjaf|kohadhafjaf]] || [[word:kohadhafshaf|kohadhafshaf]] || [[word:kohadhafkaf|kohadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kohadhasha|kohadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohadhshësha|kohadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohadhrosha|kohadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohadhmusha|kohadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohadhyasha|kohadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohadhnkshësha|gokohadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohadhnkrosha|gokohadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohadhnkmusha|gokohadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohadhnkyasha|gokohadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kohahadhasha|kohahadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohahadhshësha|kohahadhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohahadhrosha|kohahadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohahadhmusha|kohahadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohahadhyasha|kohahadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohahadhnkshësha|gokohahadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohahadhnkrosha|gokohahadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohahadhnkmusha|gokohahadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohahadhnkyasha|gokohahadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kehædhasha|kehædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kehædhshësha|kehædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kehædhrosha|kehædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kehædhmusha|kehædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kehædhyasha|kehædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokehædhnkshësha|gokehædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokehædhnkrosha|gokehædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokehædhnkmusha|gokehædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokehædhnkyasha|gokehædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kohfadhasha|kohfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohfadhshësha|kohfadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohfadhrosha|kohfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohfadhmusha|kohfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohfadhyasha|kohfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohfadhnkshësha|gokohfadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohfadhnkrosha|gokohfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohfadhnkmusha|gokohfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohfadhnkyasha|gokohfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
